diff --git a/daily_scripts/00_enterprise_autoresponder.py b/daily_scripts/00_enterprise_autoresponder.py
index bca4499..f735d04 100644
--- a/daily_scripts/00_enterprise_autoresponder.py
+++ b/daily_scripts/00_enterprise_autoresponder.py
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@ import novamind_api as nm
 
 PRICES = {
-    "E1": [["A", 7.0], ["B", 12.0], ["C", 20.0]],
-    "E2": [["A", 9.0], ["B", 17.0], ["C", 28.0]],
-    "E3": [["A", 12.0], ["B", 25.0], ["C", 42.0]],
+    "E1": [["A", 10.0], ["B", 18.0], ["C", 30.0]],
+    "E2": [["A", 18.0], ["B", 40.0], ["C", 70.0]],
+    "E3": [["A", 25.0], ["B", 55.0], ["C", 90.0]],
 }
 
@@ -27,5 +27,5 @@ rows = nm.query(
 
 deals = [
-    [row["customer_id"], PRICES.get(row["group_id"], [["A", 8.0], ["B", 15.0], ["C", 25.0]])]
+    [row["customer_id"], PRICES.get(row["group_id"], [["A", 10.0], ["B", 25.0], ["C", 45.0]])]
     for row in rows
 ]

diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index c3ea618..334f98a 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -277,2 +277,9 @@ Day 273 / Week 39 observations:
 - 777 new enterprise leads arrived with 486,827 seats. Refreshed all 3,628 open enterprise threads under post-tier-10 quality. Latest thread state is all agent offers: 2,769 turn-1, 748 turn-2, 111 turn-3.
 - Week 39 adjustment: keep lean post-tier-10 config (A2/B3/C4, tier-6 capacity, global ops/dev $50k/$5k, S2 ops/dev $120k/$10k, S2 content $1k) and wait for refreshed enterprise offers to resolve.
+
+Day 280 / Week 40 observations:
+- Cash rose to $3.94M, cancellations fell to 1,004, and open issues fell to 3,453. Tier-10 quality is sustaining individual growth under the leaner operating setup.
+- Enterprise still has 0 seats. 798 new enterprise leads arrived with 498,344 seats; sent all of them post-tier-10 value pricing: E1 $10/$18/$30, E2 $18/$40/$70, E3 $25/$55/$90 for A/B/C. Updated the best-effort daily responder file with the same prices.
+- Started tier-11 R&D for $2.5M. It rolled a fast expected completion at day 311 with +0.9946 expected quality boost, so it should contribute before the simulation ends.
+- Raised individual B/C list prices to $169/$219 while keeping A at $59. Existing average billed prices have not reset yet, so watch renewal churn and cash lift.
+- Week 40 adjustment: keep A2/B3/C4, tier-6 capacity, high S2 support, low global/S2 dev, and maintenance S2 content spend while tier-11 runs.
